signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY (Lower than 2.3-2.4% Forecasts)** | YES | HIGH confidence

South Korea's annual consumer price inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, driven by oil prices but contained below market consensus of 2.3-2.4% due to government fuel caps and food vouchers.[1][2][4] Core inflation (ex-food/energy) fell to 2.2% YoY from 2.3
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
